strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: Approximately 14 years of experience, slightly under the 15-year minimum
No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director-level technical leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC expectation
Emerging AI-agent and MCP tooling work

response.justification: The candidate is a capable, versatile full-stack engineer with entrepreneurial traits (GISCollective) and early exposure to AI-agent tooling, but the resume does not demonstrate the recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, or Principal/Director-level strategic influence the role requires. Experience tenure also lands just shy of the 15-year minimum, and cloud-platform strategy work is not evident.
